executiveSummary: The scanner detected an issue related to Port Scan Summary: 2 Open Ports. This represents a security risk on the target asset.
riskExplanation: The exposure of this module (ports) allows external clients to gather detail, potentially assisting in targeted reconnaissance. naabu discovered 2 open TCP ports on sqauto.zeraynce.com.
businessImpact: Allowing legacy properties to persist increases vulnerability rates, potentially leading to compliance failures under modern regulations like PCI-DSS.
attackScenarios: An attacker retrieves the disclosures from ports to identify misconfigured interfaces and executes tailored exploit scripts.
nextSteps: Close unnecessary services and restrict access with firewall rules
